coverage_note: The bundled EGFR population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from EGFR receptor tyrosine kinase signaling through RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, endocytosis, and growth-control pathways and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000146648: EGFR coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: EGFR findings should be read against receptor tyrosine kinase signaling through RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, endocytosis, and growth-control pathways; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

EGFR L858R is curated as a EGFR marker for Receptor tyrosine kinase signaling, Non-small cell lung cancer somatic driver context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

EGFR exon 19 deletion model is curated as a EGFR marker for Receptor tyrosine kinase signaling, Non-small cell lung cancer somatic driver context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

EGFR T790M is curated as a EGFR marker for Receptor tyrosine kinase signaling, Non-small cell lung cancer somatic driver context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
